title: 这条 prompt 通过详细的描述创造了一个具有浓厚怀旧感和电影感的街头场景，适合用于拍摄或设计具有复古和街头文化元素的营销素材，特别是针对年轻受众的时尚品牌或社交媒体推广。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 通过详细的描述创造了一个具有浓厚怀旧感和电影感的街头场景，适合用于拍摄或设计具有复古和街头文化元素的营销素材，特别是针对年轻受众的时尚品牌或社交媒体推广。
prompt_original: film photography, candid street snapshot aesthetic, razor-sharp focus on subject, shallow depth of field with soft blurred urban background, bright daylight, slightly overexposed highlights, vivid contrast, subtle analog film texture, heavy film grain, nostalgic cinematic atmosphere, Tokyo backstreet neighborhood scene near a quiet train station, narrow pedestrian street lined with Japanese convenience stores, vintage vending machines, small ramen shops, hanging signs with faded typography, bicycles parked along tiled sidewalks, utility poles and overhead wires stretching across the sky, scattered fallen leaves on the ground, distant pedestrians and passing taxis softly blurred in the background, warm afternoon sunlight with deep blue sky, realistic street fashion photography style, effortless cool street vibe, vibrant colors with slightly muted faded film tones, beautiful 19-year-old Chinese female influencer, fair porcelain skin with cold pale undertones, exquisite natural makeup, glossy soft lips, defined brows, delicate lashes, soft messy long black hair with natural flowing curves, wearing an off-shoulder white fluffy faux fur jacket, playful yet subtly seductive expression, lazy dreamy vintage filter, ultra high-quality details, intentionally mundane phone-camera snapshot feeling, casual accidental composition, imperfect framing, realistic iPhone photography texture, spontaneous candid energy, highly attractive girl casually posing in the middle of the sidewalk, body facing away from the camera while turning her head back toward the lens with direct eye contact, relaxed posture, soft wind moving her hair, emotional youthful atmosphere, modern Asian street fashion editorial, soft haze, layered composition, masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, slight motion blur from slow shutter, authentic everyday realism, “BubbleBrain” small handwritten signature text on bottom corner --ar 9:16
prompt_zh: 胶片摄影，街头抓拍风格，主体锐利对焦，浅景深搭配柔和模糊的城市背景，明亮的日光，略微过曝的高光，鲜明的对比度，微妙的模拟胶片质感，厚重的胶片颗粒，怀旧的电影氛围，东京小巷附近安静火车站附近的场景，狭窄的人行道两旁是日本便利店、复古自动售货机、小型拉面店，悬挂着褪色字体的招牌，停在铺有瓷砖的人行道上的自行车，电线杆和头顶的电线横跨天空，散落在地上的落叶，远处行人和过往出租车在背景中柔和模糊，温暖的午后阳光与深蓝色天空，写实的街头时尚摄影风格，轻松酷炫的街头氛围，鲜艳的颜色带有轻微褪色的胶片色调，19岁的中国女性网红，白皙如瓷器的皮肤带冷色调底色，精致自然的妆容，光泽柔软的嘴唇，清晰的眉毛，纤细的睫毛，自然流畅曲线的凌乱长黑发，穿着露肩白色蓬松人造皮草外套，表情调皮又略带挑逗，慵懒梦幻的复古滤镜，超高质量细节，刻意平凡的手机相机抓拍感，随意偶然的构图，不完美的取景，真实的iPhone摄影质感，自发的抓拍能量，极具吸引力的女孩在人行道中央随意摆姿势，身体背对镜头而头部转向镜头直视，放松的姿态，轻风拂动她的头发，充满情感的青春气息，现代亚洲街头时尚特辑，柔和的雾气，层次分明的构图，杰作，最佳质量，超精细，慢快门带来的轻微动态模糊，真实日常现实主义，在角落手写的小签名“BubbleBrain” --ar 9:16
